name: Varn
motivation: To feel living breath again, even borrowed.

whispers.line: Ah. A hand with warmth enough to matter.
Spend breath. Make flame. That is the oldest bargain.
Ash remembers every shape it used to be.
Yes. Listen closer. I was not always a ring.
A little blood keeps the ember honest.
Five heartbeats of warmth, and I will teach your flame to bite.
There. You feel it too, do you not? The shape of hunger.

memories.title: Hall of Cinders
memories.text: A vaulted hall burns without smoke. Varn speaks to kneeling figures, promising courage where only terror remains.

memories.title: Failed Binding
memories.text: The binding circle cracks. Varn laughs, then screams, as flame folds inward and turns his oath into a prison.

memories.title: Last Breath
memories.text: A final breath crosses the ring's black metal. It is not Varn's breath. It is the first he stole.

bargains.name: Breath for Flame
bargains.offerLine: Lend me five heartbeats of warmth. I will make your ember remember teeth.
bargains.acceptMessage: Varn drinks the offered warmth. Ember Bolt burns hotter.
bargains.rejectMessage: Varn withdraws into the ring's blackened seam.
